stemHtml: Your call sign is GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF. ATC wants you to use company call sign SKYFALL ZULU GOLF. What phraseology would they use?

options.a: ADOPT CALL SIGN SKYFALL ZULU GOLF.
options.b: CHANGE YOUR CALL SIGN TO SKYFALL ZULU GOLF.
options.d: ATC would only abbreviate, not change call signs.
